Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}Isn't it interesting how the sunlight on a clear winter day seems stronger than it is during the summer?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}Perhaps it's because the sun is lower in the sky, and you don't have to look up to see it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_000_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}I've gotten so used to this view... But no two times is it ever exactly the same.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}{f 4 23 0 7 3 25 25}You could say the same thing about one's day to day.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}The Promised Day is almost here.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}{f 5 13 22 15 7}Whenever I come up here, I get lost in my thoughts.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}{f 4 23 0 7 3 25 25}"I can't let it end like this..." "I want to protect it all." Thoughts like that.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}Since last time... I've tried thinking things through more rationally.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}I thought about that old lady and Mii-chan-san... and Kiyoshi-san as well.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}I wonder if Mii-chan-san was alone until the moment of her death...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}Somewhere no one could find her...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}I think... the old lady wanted to be there for her at the end.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}To live means to be connected to other people, but life is finite. Farewells are unavoidable.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}It's sad to think about, but you and I will have to part one day as well.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}And then... I'll never be able to see you again.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}There are so many things in life I don't understand... It's filled with so much pain.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}You meet others, forge relationships, and spend time with them... and then they're gone, leaving you behind.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}When I think about that, I just can't hold back my feelings.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 26 0 0}No two views are alike. No two days are the same.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 27 0 0}It's natural for everything to disappear, reemerge, and constantly change.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 28 0 0}Life is both short and finite.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 29 0 0}That's what makes it so invaluable, and why one feels that it must be cherished...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 30 0 0}When you think about it, it's a miracle that two given people are able to ever meet in this chaotic flow of time and space...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 31 0 0}I believe that's why we find happiness in forging bonds and relationships with others.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 32 0 0}And... that might be the true joy of being alive...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 33 0 0}{f 4 23 0 7 3 25 25}It can be sad, but at the same time so warm... Beautiful because it is destined to end...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_6_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 34 0 0}And that's why... I mustn't hesitate any longer.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_7_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 36 0 0}Even if this wish of mine is to never come true... I still want to tell you my true feelings...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 8 -1 -1 1 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 41 0 0}I know I'm a machine. I know... that I cannot truly touch you as a human.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I sense Aigis' strong affection towards me...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I'd better choose my words carefully...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Come to think of it, {f 0 1 2}I have a special{f 0 1 27}[n]{f 0 1 2}relationship with another person already{f 0 1 27}...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 3 -1 -1 1 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 44 0 0}I love you so much... that I feel like I'm going to break down somehow...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_1_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 48 0 0}I-I'm sorry. I can't... think of anything to say...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_2_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 49 0 0}Perhaps something really has broken inside of me...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Aigis has expressed her feelings for me.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I have entered a special[n]relationship with Aigis...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}There's no going back now...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_021_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 3 -1 -1 1 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 54 0 0}I-I'll go ahead. I... It's too difficult to look you in the eye right now.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_022_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}We decided to go back[n]to the dorm separately.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_024_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 60 0 0}I-I'm sorry. I can't... think of anything to say...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 61 0 0}Perhaps something really has broken inside of me...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_024_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 62 0 0}I thought being able to tell you my feelings would have been enough for me...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 63 0 0}But, it's only made me want to be with you more... I'm hopeless, aren't I?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_025_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Aigis expressed her feelings for me.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It seems we've grown closer...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_026_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 65 0 0}I'm grateful that you gave me a straight answer, and that you treated me like a human being.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_026_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 66 0 0}...It's painful. But now, I feel like I can move on without regrets.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_026_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 69 0 0}{f 4 23 0 7 1 25 25}And if you don't mind, I'd like to be as we always have. As a friend by your side.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_027_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I decided to go back to the dorm with Aigis.[n]{f 1 1}
